nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs at 9 AM on 25th of every month

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  employee_id: $json.employee_id,
  year_month: $json.year_month,
  month_name: $json.month_name,
  basic_salary: $json.basic_salary,
  hra: $json.hra,
  conveyance_allowance: $json.conveyance_allowance,
  medical_allowance: $json.medical_allowance,
  special_allowance: $json.special_allowance,
  gross_earnings: $json.gross_earnings,
  pf_employee: $json.pf_employee,
  esi_employee: $json.esi_employee,
  tds: $json.tds,
  professional_tax: $json.professional_tax,
  total_deductions: $json.total_deductions,
  net_salary: $json.net_salary
}
